body:
## Problem
Terms like "Workspace" and "Bulk" don't match common user mental models.

## Impact
- Cognitive friction
- Poor match between system and real world (Heuristic #2)

## Tasks
- [ ] Rename "Workspace" to "My Resumes" in the sidebar and routes
- [ ] Rename "Bulk" to "Manage Multi-Resume" or "Bulk Operations"
- [ ] Update all breadcrumbs and internal links to reflect new naming
- [ ] Add tooltips explaining the purpose of each section
title: [UX-05] Simplify & Standardize Navigation Labels
